nasb.text: As far as the east is from the west, So far has He removed our transgressions from us.

esv.text: as far as the east is from the west, so far does he remove our transgressions from us.

cnv.text: 東離西有多遠， 他使我們的過犯離我們也有多遠。

ccb.text: 东离西有多远， 祂叫我们的过犯离我们也多远！

csbs.text: 东离西有多么远， 他使我们的过犯离我们也多么远；
